description: This file defines styles for label elements used in forms, including base labels, horizontal labels, and size-specific labels (large and small). It uses variables and mixins for styling consistency and includes comments explaining usage scenarios.

methods.name: font-size()
methods.description: A Sass mixin used to set the font size, possibly accepting a variable or size literal.

methods.name: add()
methods.description: A Sass function to add two length values, used here for padding calculations.
